Weekly Raid Boss Report

Overview
Start Date 2026-05-11
End Date 2026-05-17
Duration 7 days
File Name raid_boss_20260511_7days.html
Raid - Type Cradle of the Stars
Raid - Max Level Killed 150
Raid - Guild Morale 19,616
Raid - Total Boss Damage 842,373,764
Raid - Total Boss Attacks 105
Raid - Total Participants 21

Pet H1 H2 H3 H4 H5 Team Boss Level Damage User % Total %
NauT
130
130
130
130
130
130
182K191K166K194K174K196K1.1M1505.37M75.75%0.64%
+25%
Dreamer's Retaliation
All heroes on the team deal 25% bonus damage against Nightmares for each Nightmare on the battlefield.
+30%
Nightmare's Energy
When Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions is triggered, the hero that generates the Nightmare gains 30% energy for damage dealt to it.
+30%
Marksman Opportunity
If a Marksman uses their ultimate while Planet Parade or Quasar Light is active, they will recover 30% energy over 5 seconds.
10
Survivor's Willpower
Defeating a Nightmare generated by Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions grants a 10-second 100% Vampirism aura to the entire team.
7
Chosen by the Stars
After a Meteor Shower, all Healers gain a buff that increases all healing dealt by 100% for the duration of 7 seconds.
-10%
Stellar Tank Resilience
Tank heroes take 10% less damage from Defense Sphere basic attacks.
7
Immortal Hero
The hero that deals the most damage while Planet Parade or Quasar Light is active gains Immortality for 7 seconds.
+25%
Healing Converter
25% of healing exceeding heroes' max health is converted into pure damage dealt to Defense Spheres.
3
Astral Shield
Triggers an Astral Shield once per battle. The Shield absorbs all damage from Defense Sphere explosions in the Wormhole. The Shield is triggered automatically when 3 or more Defense Spheres enter the Wormhole.
+2%
Sphere Energy Unleashed
Destroying a Defense Sphere grants 2% energy to the hero that deals the final hit.

Wakeful Undead
Grants a permanent buff if there are three Undead on the team. Each team member has a 25% chance not to fall asleep while Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions is active.

All heroes on the team deal 25% bonus damage against Nightmares for each Nightmare on the battlefield.

Ingenious Engineers
Grants a permanent buff if there are three Engineers on the team. Each team member deals 3% bonus damage to the Stardome.

+100%
Meteors of Haste
While Meteor Shower is active, all heroes boost their speed by 100%.
+15%
Defense Sphere Destroyer
Boosts damage dealt to Defense Spheres by 15%.
+25%
Jumpstart
All heroes enter combat with 25% Energy.
-15%
Defense Sphere Override
Weakens the basic attacks of Defense Spheres by 15%.
-9%
Wormhole Suppressor
Decreases damage dealt by the Wormhole and Wormhole Generator skills by 9%.
3
Astral Shield
Triggers an Astral Shield once per battle. The Shield absorbs all damage from Defense Sphere explosions in the Wormhole. The Shield is triggered automatically when 3 or more Defense Spheres enter the Wormhole.
-50%
Mage's Vigilance
When Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions is triggered, the Nightmares generated by Mages have 50% less health.
4
Insomnia
A single use of Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions can't unleash more than 4 Nightmares.
+10%
Keeper's Blessing
When Osh the Eternal Keeper awakens, the hero that dealt the most damage before the Planet Parade began will gain 10% more stats.
+25%
Healing Converter
25% of healing exceeding heroes' max health is converted into pure damage dealt to Defense Spheres.
+2%
Sphere Energy Unleashed
Destroying a Defense Sphere grants 2% energy to the hero that deals the final hit.

-10%
Stellar Tank Resilience
Tank heroes take 10% less damage from Defense Sphere basic attacks.
+15%
Resilient Grove Keeper
Grants a permanent buff if there are three Grove Keepers on the team. Each team member has a 15% chance to avoid damage when Defense Spheres collide with the Wormhole.

Astral Shield
Triggers an Astral Shield once per battle. The Shield absorbs all damage from Defense Sphere explosions in the Wormhole. The Shield is triggered automatically when 3 or more Defense Spheres enter the Wormhole.
+10%
Keeper's Blessing
When Osh the Eternal Keeper awakens, the hero that dealt the most damage before the Planet Parade began will gain 10% more stats.
+25%
Healing Converter
25% of healing exceeding heroes' max health is converted into pure damage dealt to Defense Spheres.
+25%
Dreamer's Retaliation
All heroes on the team deal 25% bonus damage against Nightmares for each Nightmare on the battlefield.
Anophelus
120
130
130
130
130
130
142K99.5K181K199K51.9K170K844K160491K0.15%0.06%
+25%
Jumpstart
All heroes enter combat with 25% Energy.
-15%
Wormhole Suppressor
Decreases damage dealt by the Wormhole and Wormhole Generator skills by 15%.
+20%
Meteors of Haste
While Meteor Shower is active, all heroes boost their speed by 20%.
+30%
Marksman Opportunity
If a Marksman uses their ultimate while Planet Parade or Quasar Light is active, they will recover 30% energy over 5 seconds.
+30%
Nightmare's Energy
When Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions is triggered, the hero that generates the Nightmare gains 30% energy for damage dealt to it.
7
Chosen by the Stars
After a Meteor Shower, all Healers gain a buff that increases all healing dealt by 100% for the duration of 7 seconds.
10
Survivor's Willpower
Defeating a Nightmare generated by Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions grants a 10-second 100% Vampirism aura to the entire team.
7
Immortal Hero
The hero that deals the most damage while Planet Parade or Quasar Light is active gains Immortality for 7 seconds.
-10%
Stellar Tank Resilience
Tank heroes take 10% less damage from Defense Sphere basic attacks.
3

25% of healing exceeding heroes' max health is converted into pure damage dealt to Defense Spheres.
+25%
Dreamer's Retaliation
All heroes on the team deal 25% bonus damage against Nightmares for each Nightmare on the battlefield.

Jumpstart

Meteors of Haste

+6%
Defense Sphere Destroyer
Boosts damage dealt to Defense Spheres by 6%.

Wormhole Suppressor
Decreases damage dealt by the Wormhole and Wormhole Generator skills by 3%.
+25%
Dreamer's Retaliation
All heroes on the team deal 25% bonus damage against Nightmares for each Nightmare on the battlefield.
+30%
Nightmare's Energy

7
Immortal Hero

4
Insomnia
A single use of Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions can't unleash more than 4 Nightmares.
+2%
Sphere Energy Unleashed
Destroying a Defense Sphere grants 2% energy to the hero that deals the final hit.
+10%
Keeper's Blessing
When Osh the Eternal Keeper awakens, the hero that dealt the most damage before the Planet Parade began will gain 10% more stats.
-50%
Mage's Vigilance
When Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions is triggered, the Nightmares generated by Mages have 50% less health.

172K143K98.6K62.9K54.9K113K645K1501.46M51.14%0.17%
+25%
Dreamer's Retaliation
All heroes on the team deal 25% bonus damage against Nightmares for each Nightmare on the battlefield.
+25%
Wakeful Undead
Grants a permanent buff if there are three Undead on the team. Each team member has a 25% chance not to fall asleep while Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions is active.
+30%
Nightmare's Energy
When Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions is triggered, the hero that generates the Nightmare gains 30% energy for damage dealt to it.
+3%
Ingenious Engineers
Grants a permanent buff if there are three Engineers on the team. Each team member deals 3% bonus damage to the Stardome.

121K197K186K181K187K185K1.06M1503.61M44.4%0.43%
+25%
Dreamer's Retaliation
All heroes on the team deal 25% bonus damage against Nightmares for each Nightmare on the battlefield.
+30%
Nightmare's Energy
When Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions is triggered, the hero that generates the Nightmare gains 30% energy for damage dealt to it.
10
Survivor's Willpower
Defeating a Nightmare generated by Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions grants a 10-second 100% Vampirism aura to the entire team.
7
Chosen by the Stars
After a Meteor Shower, all Healers gain a buff that increases all healing dealt by 100% for the duration of 7 seconds.
7
Immortal Hero
The hero that deals the most damage while Planet Parade or Quasar Light is active gains Immortality for 7 seconds.
3
Astral Shield
Triggers an Astral Shield once per battle. The Shield absorbs all damage from Defense Sphere explosions in the Wormhole. The Shield is triggered automatically when 3 or more Defense Spheres enter the Wormhole.
+25%
Healing Converter
25% of healing exceeding heroes' max health is converted into pure damage dealt to Defense Spheres.
+2%
Sphere Energy Unleashed
Destroying a Defense Sphere grants 2% energy to the hero that deals the final hit.
4
Insomnia
A single use of Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions can't unleash more than 4 Nightmares.
Kajrilisar

130
130
130
130
130

Keeper's Blessing
When Osh the Eternal Keeper awakens, the hero that dealt the most damage before the Planet Parade began will gain 10% more stats.

Astral Shield
Triggers an Astral Shield once per battle. The Shield absorbs all damage from Defense Sphere explosions in the Wormhole. The Shield is triggered automatically when 3 or more Defense Spheres enter the Wormhole.

Marksman Opportunity

Chosen by the Stars

Dreamer's Retaliation

Meteors of Haste

Jumpstart
All heroes enter combat with 5% Energy.

Triggers an Astral Shield once per battle. The Shield absorbs all damage from Defense Sphere explosions in the Wormhole. The Shield is triggered automatically when 3 or more Defense Spheres enter the Wormhole.
+25%
Dreamer's Retaliation
All heroes on the team deal 25% bonus damage against Nightmares for each Nightmare on the battlefield.
Team 2PFF
130
130
130
130
130
130
76K60.1K46.2K50.8K57.6K51.4K342K150170K0.83%0.02%
+30%
Marksman Opportunity
If a Marksman uses their ultimate while Planet Parade or Quasar Light is active, they will recover 30% energy over 5 seconds.
-10%
Stellar Tank Resilience
Tank heroes take 10% less damage from Defense Sphere basic attacks.
10
Survivor's Willpower
Defeating a Nightmare generated by Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions grants a 10-second 100% Vampirism aura to the entire team.
7
Chosen by the Stars
After a Meteor Shower, all Healers gain a buff that increases all healing dealt by 100% for the duration of 7 seconds.
7
Immortal Hero
The hero that deals the most damage while Planet Parade or Quasar Light is active gains Immortality for 7 seconds.
+25%
Healing Converter
25% of healing exceeding heroes' max health is converted into pure damage dealt to Defense Spheres.
+10%
Keeper's Blessing
When Osh the Eternal Keeper awakens, the hero that dealt the most damage before the Planet Parade began will gain 10% more stats.
+2%
Sphere Energy Unleashed
Destroying a Defense Sphere grants 2% energy to the hero that deals the final hit.
3
Astral Shield
Triggers an Astral Shield once per battle. The Shield absorbs all damage from Defense Sphere explosions in the Wormhole. The Shield is triggered automatically when 3 or more Defense Spheres enter the Wormhole.
+25%
Dreamer's Retaliation
All heroes on the team deal 25% bonus damage against Nightmares for each Nightmare on the battlefield.

+25%
Dreamer's Retaliation
All heroes on the team deal 25% bonus damage against Nightmares for each Nightmare on the battlefield.
10
Survivor's Willpower
Defeating a Nightmare generated by Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions grants a 10-second 100% Vampirism aura to the entire team.
+40%
Meteors of Haste
While Meteor Shower is active, all heroes boost their speed by 40%.
4
Insomnia
A single use of Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions can't unleash more than 4 Nightmares.
-50%
Mage's Vigilance
When Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions is triggered, the Nightmares generated by Mages have 50% less health.
+10%
Keeper's Blessing
When Osh the Eternal Keeper awakens, the hero that dealt the most damage before the Planet Parade began will gain 10% more stats.
+30%
Nightmare's Energy
When Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions is triggered, the hero that generates the Nightmare gains 30% energy for damage dealt to it.
+30%
Marksman Opportunity
If a Marksman uses their ultimate while Planet Parade or Quasar Light is active, they will recover 30% energy over 5 seconds.
3
Astral Shield
Triggers an Astral Shield once per battle. The Shield absorbs all damage from Defense Sphere explosions in the Wormhole. The Shield is triggered automatically when 3 or more Defense Spheres enter the Wormhole.
+15%
Resilient Grove Keeper
Grants a permanent buff if there are three Grove Keepers on the team. Each team member has a 15% chance to avoid damage when Defense Spheres collide with the Wormhole.
+25%
Healing Converter
25% of healing exceeding heroes' max health is converted into pure damage dealt to Defense Spheres.
+2%
Sphere Energy Unleashed
Destroying a Defense Sphere grants 2% energy to the hero that deals the final hit.

114K164K201K142K153K178K952K1506.16M68.44%0.73%
+25%
Dreamer's Retaliation
All heroes on the team deal 25% bonus damage against Nightmares for each Nightmare on the battlefield.
+30%
Nightmare's Energy
When Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions is triggered, the hero that generates the Nightmare gains 30% energy for damage dealt to it.
+30%
Marksman Opportunity
If a Marksman uses their ultimate while Planet Parade or Quasar Light is active, they will recover 30% energy over 5 seconds.
+25%
Wakeful Undead
Grants a permanent buff if there are three Undead on the team. Each team member has a 25% chance not to fall asleep while Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions is active.
7
Chosen by the Stars
After a Meteor Shower, all Healers gain a buff that increases all healing dealt by 100% for the duration of 7 seconds.
+3%
Ingenious Engineers
Grants a permanent buff if there are three Engineers on the team. Each team member deals 3% bonus damage to the Stardome.
-10%
Stellar Tank Resilience
Tank heroes take 10% less damage from Defense Sphere basic attacks.
7
Immortal Hero
The hero that deals the most damage while Planet Parade or Quasar Light is active gains Immortality for 7 seconds.
SodCheun0000003.21M09M01.07%
mo-mo
130
130
130
130
130
130
172K188K155K175K177K187K1.05M15023.8M43.15%2.82%
+30%
Marksman Opportunity
If a Marksman uses their ultimate while Planet Parade or Quasar Light is active, they will recover 30% energy over 5 seconds.
7
Immortal Hero
The hero that deals the most damage while Planet Parade or Quasar Light is active gains Immortality for 7 seconds.
7
Chosen by the Stars
After a Meteor Shower, all Healers gain a buff that increases all healing dealt by 100% for the duration of 7 seconds.
-10%
Stellar Tank Resilience
Tank heroes take 10% less damage from Defense Sphere basic attacks.
3
Astral Shield
Triggers an Astral Shield once per battle. The Shield absorbs all damage from Defense Sphere explosions in the Wormhole. The Shield is triggered automatically when 3 or more Defense Spheres enter the Wormhole.
+10%
Keeper's Blessing
When Osh the Eternal Keeper awakens, the hero that dealt the most damage before the Planet Parade began will gain 10% more stats.
+25%
Healing Converter
25% of healing exceeding heroes' max health is converted into pure damage dealt to Defense Spheres.
+2%
Sphere Energy Unleashed
Destroying a Defense Sphere grants 2% energy to the hero that deals the final hit.
4
Insomnia
A single use of Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions can't unleash more than 4 Nightmares.
+25%
Wakeful Undead
Grants a permanent buff if there are three Undead on the team. Each team member has a 25% chance not to fall asleep while Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions is active.
+30%
Nightmare's Energy
When Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions is triggered, the hero that generates the Nightmare gains 30% energy for damage dealt to it.

-10%
Stellar Tank Resilience
Tank heroes take 10% less damage from Defense Sphere basic attacks.
10
Survivor's Willpower
Defeating a Nightmare generated by Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions grants a 10-second 100% Vampirism aura to the entire team.
3
Astral Shield
Triggers an Astral Shield once per battle. The Shield absorbs all damage from Defense Sphere explosions in the Wormhole. The Shield is triggered automatically when 3 or more Defense Spheres enter the Wormhole.
7
Immortal Hero
The hero that deals the most damage while Planet Parade or Quasar Light is active gains Immortality for 7 seconds.
+25%
Dreamer's Retaliation
All heroes on the team deal 25% bonus damage against Nightmares for each Nightmare on the battlefield.
-50%
Mage's Vigilance
When Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions is triggered, the Nightmares generated by Mages have 50% less health.
4
Insomnia
A single use of Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions can't unleash more than 4 Nightmares.

130
130
130
100
80

+25%
Healing Converter
25% of healing exceeding heroes' max health is converted into pure damage dealt to Defense Spheres.
7
Chosen by the Stars
After a Meteor Shower, all Healers gain a buff that increases all healing dealt by 100% for the duration of 7 seconds.
+10%
Keeper's Blessing
When Osh the Eternal Keeper awakens, the hero that dealt the most damage before the Planet Parade began will gain 10% more stats.
+30%

118K62.6K68.7K104K102K85.5K540K1501.07M2.08%0.13%
+15%
Defense Sphere Destroyer
Boosts damage dealt to Defense Spheres by 15%.
-15%
Wormhole Suppressor
Decreases damage dealt by the Wormhole and Wormhole Generator skills by 15%.
+100%
Meteors of Haste
While Meteor Shower is active, all heroes boost their speed by 100%.
+25%
Jumpstart
All heroes enter combat with 25% Energy.
+25%
Wakeful Undead
Grants a permanent buff if there are three Undead on the team. Each team member has a 25% chance not to fall asleep while Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions is active.
+30%
Marksman Opportunity
If a Marksman uses their ultimate while Planet Parade or Quasar Light is active, they will recover 30% energy over 5 seconds.
+30%
Nightmare's Energy
When Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions is triggered, the hero that generates the Nightmare gains 30% energy for damage dealt to it.
7
Chosen by the Stars
After a Meteor Shower, all Healers gain a buff that increases all healing dealt by 100% for the duration of 7 seconds.
+10%
Keeper's Blessing
When Osh the Eternal Keeper awakens, the hero that dealt the most damage before the Planet Parade began will gain 10% more stats.
3
Astral Shield
Triggers an Astral Shield once per battle. The Shield absorbs all damage from Defense Sphere explosions in the Wormhole. The Shield is triggered automatically when 3 or more Defense Spheres enter the Wormhole.
+2%
Sphere Energy Unleashed
Destroying a Defense Sphere grants 2% energy to the hero that deals the final hit.
+25%
Healing Converter
25% of healing exceeding heroes' max health is converted into pure damage dealt to Defense Spheres.
+15%
Resilient Grove Keeper
Grants a permanent buff if there are three Grove Keepers on the team. Each team member has a 15% chance to avoid damage when Defense Spheres collide with the Wormhole.
-10%
Stellar Tank Resilience
Tank heroes take 10% less damage from Defense Sphere basic attacks.
10
Survivor's Willpower
Defeating a Nightmare generated by Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions grants a 10-second 100% Vampirism aura to the entire team.
-9%
Defense Sphere Override
Weakens the basic attacks of Defense Spheres by 9%.
